description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit crafted from light-colored wood, featuring a modern, sculptural design. The front face is partially open with a wavy vertical cutout, revealing four evenly spaced, semi-circular shelves inside. The sides are solid, with one side showing the curved profile of the shelves, while the back is completely closed and flat. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and contemporary aesthetic. The open front and curved shelves make it suitable for displaying decorative items or storing books in an urban environment. Its slim profile allows it to fit easily against walls or in tight spaces.
description: A tall, slim wooden shelving unit with a wavy open front and four curved shelves, finished in a light wood tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wavy vertical cutout and partial visibility of the shelves inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the shelves and the unit's narrow depth.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the open front, all four shelves, and the sculptural design.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a solid, flat wooden surface with no openings.
